testCases.title: Verify navigation to Countries of the World page
steps: Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Countries of the World: A Simple Example")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/simple/'
expected: Countries of the World page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Hockey Teams page
steps: Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Hockey Teams: Forms, Searching and Pagination")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Oscar Winning Films page
steps: Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Oscar Winning Films: AJAX and Javascript")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/ajax-javascript/'
expected: Oscar Winning Films page loads successfully
